nasb.text: So the flocks mated by the rods, and the flocks brought forth striped, speckled, and spotted.

esv.text: the flocks bred in front of the sticks and so the flocks brought forth striped, speckled, and spotted.

cnv.text: 羊群對著枝子交配，就生下有條紋和有斑點的小羊來。

ccb.text: 它们对着这些树枝交配，就生下有条纹和有斑点的羊羔。

csbs.text: 羊在枝子前面交配，就生下有纹、有点、有斑的。
